infection, (e.g., heat, redness, swelling, drainage) and the patient has elevated body 
temperature. For each home health visit, the clinical notes must demonstrate that the 
skilled observation and monitoring is required. 

EXAMPLE 3: 

A patient was hospitalized following a heart attack. Following treatment he was 
discharged home. Because it is not known whether increasing exertion will exacerbate 
the heart disease, skilled observation is reasonable and necessary
